rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Prime Old County Lp, Prime Old County Acquisition Llc Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 5, 2016 line 1. Defendant Prime Old County Lp, Prime Old County Acquisition Llc's Motion For Order Establishing Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to deem admissions admitted is GRANTED. Motion for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 5, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT KEARNY UNION, LLC,, TAMAR FRUCHTMAN's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint continued to August 12, 2016 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 5, 2016 line 4. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016. GRANTED. July 18, 2016 order was served on Defendant on July 20, 2016 by mail. (See Proof of Service filed on August 1, 2016). Defendant failed to comply with the Order. Defendant is ordered to be present at the hearing. Defendant is to bring the keys and turn them over. Sanctions granted under CCP 177.5 in the amount of $1,000 to be paid by Mohanna within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RUBEN DIAZ ET AL VS. JOSE PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 5, 2016 line 5. DEFENDANT JOSE PEREZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Even if the burden were shifted there is a triable issue of fact whether landlord resides at the premises. = (501/REQ)
